course_title: DESIGNING AND MANAGING THE LEARNING ENVIRONMENT
description: Provides knowledge and skills necessary to effectively and efficiently engage with students and manage the classroom environment. Ability to support the academic and social-emotional growth of children enhanced through knowledge gained regarding children's self-regulation, motivation, school climate, multi-tiered behavioral interventions, and school wide positive behavior support.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Educational Psychology: Professional Educator (MSPE)

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Educational Psychology: Professional Educator (MSPE)
